sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this NES platformer

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Player (Gizmo) controls character through various levels armed with multiple weapon types that vary by stage: genetically modified super tomato in laboratory sections, matchstick-firing bow in later sections, and other implements

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No precise physics parameters are documented in available sources. Sources provide game overview, regional differences, and development info but no mechanical specifications, movement values, or gravity constants.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Gremlins 2: The New Batch (NES)
Wikipedia - Gremlins 2: The New Batch (video game)
